categories.name: Communication
categories.description: Skills related to expressing needs and wants

questions.text: How often does your child request desired items or activities?
How often does your child answer simple questions (e.g., 'What's your name?')?
How often does your child use words or gestures to greet others?

categories.name: Social Skills
categories.description: Skills related to interacting with others

questions.text: How often does your child play cooperatively with peers?
How often does your child make eye contact during interactions?
How often does your child share toys or materials with others?

categories.name: Daily Living
categories.description: Skills related to self-care and independence

questions.text: How often does your child independently use the toilet?
How often does your child feed themselves using utensils?
How often does your child put on simple clothing items independently?

categories.name: Behavior
categories.description: Skills related to self-regulation and following directions

questions.text: How often does your child follow simple one-step directions?
How often does your child transition between activities without difficulty?
How often does your child wait appropriately when asked?
